visual_description: A man with graying hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket and a white shirt, is sitting in a dimly lit room. He is holding a black mobile phone to his right ear and appears to be listening intently, with his eyes closed and a serious expression on his face. The background consists of dark wooden shelves holding a few white bowls.
audio_description: The audio consists of a low, continuous hum, possibly from an engine or machinery, with no other discernible sounds.
